title: salvia ranzaniana
intro: Salvia ranzaniana, also known as Yunnan sage, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, native to the mountainous regions of southwestern China. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Salvia ranzaniana include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Salvia ranzaniana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
